_README: Public OAuth client config bundled with seo-bhishma. Per Google's OAuth 2.0 spec for installed apps, the client_id is not confidential. We use PKCE (RFC 7636) on top so no client_secret is required either.  TO ENABLE: register a Desktop-app OAuth client at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials and replace the placeholder client_id below with the value Google issues.  Users can override this with their own OAuth JSON by setting SEO_BHISHMA_GSC_CREDENTIALS_PATH.
